title: fix: make polly OpenAI-compatible with full param passthrough
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly learns the protocol
gist.blurb: Our resident bee now speaks fluent OpenAI. Full parameter support and proper response formats mean she plays nice with all your standard tools.
gist.summary: Updated the Polly agent API to be fully OpenAI-compatible, ensuring correct response structures and passing through all generation parameters.
gist.impact: The `polly` model can now be used as a drop-in replacement in standard AI libraries without validation errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee successfully interfacing with the standard API system (represented by the Monitor Robot). The theme is 'compatibility' and 'standards' - fitting a piece into the puzzle.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot handing a glowing green data block to the monitor robot, who gives a thumbs up. The block fits perfectly into a slot. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Cute bee mascot and chunky robot with retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Pixel text: '200 OK'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
